title: dogsvilla worker-inbox envelope
description: Messages dispatched into a worker inbox (dv-backend, dv-frontend, dv-customer-portal, etc.).

from.description: Dispatcher identity: 'orchestrator', a domain orchestrator name, 'qa', or another dispatching worker.

to.description: Target worker name, e.g. 'backend', 'frontend', 'customer-portal', or '*' for broadcast.

items.description: <task_id>:<worker> reference that must have a type:result before this task starts.

depends_on.description: Task IDs that must complete before this task starts.

required_checks.description: Exact checks the worker must run before reporting type:result, e.g. ['lint', 'build', 'test', 'committed'].

ui_verified_instructions.description: Required when 'ui_verified' appears in required_checks. Exact screen, action, and expected outcome — specific enough that the worker cannot satisfy it by reading code alone. Example: 'Open /dogs/:id → click Award Badge → confirm dropdown shows badge names'.
